     Spec: https://llmstxt.org -->

# Forage for All

> Open-source, AGPLv3-licensed mobile app (iOS + Android) that maps fruit trees and edible plants growing on public land. Community-run, no ads, no tracking, no selling location data.

Built with Expo + React Native + TypeScript + InstantDB + Google Maps.

## Docs

- [Repository README](https://github.com/forage-for-all/app/blob/main/README.md): Project overview, install, stack
- [Agent guide](https://github.com/forage-for-all/app/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Canonical guide for AI coding agents working in this repo
- [Architecture](https://github.com/forage-for-all/app/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): 5-minute mental model of the system
- [Contributing](https://github.com/forage-for-all/app/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to pitch in, code style, PR flow
- [Foraging Ethics](https://github.com/forage-for-all/app/blob/main/FORAGING_ETHICS.md): Community agreement every contributor operates under

## Policy

- [Privacy Policy](https://github.com/forage-for-all/app/blob/main/PRIVACY.md): No analytics, no trackers, fuzzy locations by default
- [Security Policy](https://github.com/forage-for-all/app/blob/main/SECURITY.md): Responsible disclosure
- [License (AGPLv3)](https://github.com/forage-for-all/app/blob/main/LICENSE): Modified versions must share source, including hosted services

## Optional

- [Good first issues for agents](https://github.com/forage-for-all/app/blob/main/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/agent-tasks.md): Pre-scoped tasks with file paths and acceptance criteria
- [Press kit](https://forage-for-all.github.io/app/press/): Logos, screenshots, boilerplate
